name: 1-2-3-4 Cake Filling and Topping by James Beard
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the orange juice, lemon juice, sugar and orange rind together until well combined.
2. Drizzle the mixture over three warm cake layers, spreading it evenly to avoid soaking in one spot.
3. Carefully pile the cake layers on top of each other.
4. The fruit-flavored icing will give the cake a fresh, fruity flavor without being rich like chocolate or candy flavors. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
